articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
articles.description: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
articles.description: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

images.name: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
images.caption: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

keyEvents.text: Goal! Mexico 1, Iceland 0. Richard Ledezma (Mexico) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Armando González.
Goal! Mexico 2, Iceland 0. Armando González (Mexico) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Mexico. Alexis Gutiérrez replaces Roberto Alvarado.
Substitution, Mexico. Carlos Rodríguez replaces Efraín Álvarez.
Substitution, Mexico. Érick Sánchez replaces Marcel Ruíz.
Goal! Mexico 3, Iceland 0. Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alexis Gutiérrez with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Iceland. Óskar Borgthórsson replaces Emil Atlason.
Substitution, Iceland. Hallgrímur Steingrímsson replaces Helgi Gudjónsson.
Substitution, Iceland. Hans Gudmundsson replaces Gudmundur Kristjánsson.
Substitution, Mexico. Jesús Garza replaces Richard Ledezma.
Substitution, Mexico. Guillermo Martínez replaces Armando González.
Substitution, Mexico. Diego Campillo replaces Érik Lira.
Ágúst Thorsteinsson (Iceland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Iceland. Birnir Ingason replaces Ágúst Thorsteinsson.
Substitution, Iceland. Baldur Helgason replaces Gudmundur Thórarinsson.
Substitution, Iceland. Daníel Hafsteinsson replaces Jóhann Gudmundsson.
Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Mexico 4, Iceland 0. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Offside, Mexico. Armando González is caught offside.
Foul by Jóhann Gudmundsson (Iceland).
Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Damir Muminovic.

play.text: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Damir Muminovic.

commentary.text: Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) header from the left side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado following a corner.

play.text: Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) header from the left side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado following a corner.

commentary.text: Foul by Ágúst Thorsteinsson (Iceland).
Marcel Ruíz (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Gylfi Sigurdsson (Iceland).
Marcel Ruíz (Mexico) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Jesús Gallardo.
Attempt saved. Ágúst Thorsteinsson (Iceland) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Höskuldur Gunnlaugsson.

play.text: Ágúst Þorsteinsson (Iceland) Shot On Target at 13'

commentary.text: Attempt saved. Jóhann Gudmundsson (Iceland) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Helgi Gudjónsson.

play.text: Jóhann Gudmundsson (Iceland) Shot On Target at 13'

commentary.text: Offside, Mexico. Armando González is caught offside.
Armando González (Mexico) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Damir Muminovic (Iceland).
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Damir Muminovic.

play.text: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Damir Muminovic.

commentary.text: Attempt blocked. Richard Ledezma (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Brian Gutiérrez.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Emil Atlason.
